# No-rounding Convert symbols from CUDA 12.9 — regenerate on CUDA bump.
# Shape: SRC+STEP, DST+STEP, SIZE (no NppRoundMode parameter).
# Rounding-mode variants (NppRoundMode) are tracked under F5.2.
# 16f is excluded from the safe layer.
#
# This is a DRAFT — validated against bindings.rs in Phase 4 Step 1.
# Do not invent symbols; correct the fixture if a symbol is absent.
